subject: What you built with those free tools
body:
Hey there,

I've been curious what you're doing with the guides and skills you downloaded. A few people mentioned they're using the Architecture Overview Generator with their existing Claude workflows, which is honestly my favorite part of what we're building.

If you've had a chance to try any of our products, I'd love to know what stuck with you. And if you haven't yet, our latest post on scaling automation might give you some fresh ideas for what's possible.

Cheers,
mini-on-ai.com
